name: Cardinals
signature: The forever-rebuild. Always tomorrow.

name: Falcons
signature: 28-3 forever. The most painful franchise in football.

name: Ravens
signature: Lamar Jackson's house. Always good, never enough in January.

name: Bills
signature: Bills Mafia, table-jumping. Josh Allen as the perpetual heartbreak.

name: Panthers
signature: David Tepper's chaos. They draft a QB every year.

name: Bears
signature: Caleb Williams era. Da Bears, but with painted nails.

name: Bengals
signature: Joe Burrow in mint Cartiers. Ja'Marr Chase running rich.

name: Browns
signature: The most cursed franchise in sports. They paid Deshaun Watson.

name: Cowboys
signature: America's Team. Jerry Jones as the Logan Roy of football. Always 12-5, always out in the divisional round.

name: Broncos
signature: Peyton's ghost still haunts the building.

name: Lions
signature: Knee-cap-biting energy. America's wholesome obsession.

name: Packers
signature: Cheeseheads. QB factory. Jordan Love era.

name: Texans
signature: C.J. Stroud's team. The young, scary contender.

name: Colts
signature: Anthony Richardson. They're trying to figure it out, in public.

name: Jaguars
signature: Trevor Lawrence in teal. Vibes are inconsistent.

name: Chiefs
signature: Mahomes + Kelce + Reid. The era. Three Super Bowls in five years. Taylor Swift cameos.

name: Raiders
signature: Vegas relocated, Davis ownership. Maxx Crosby keeps the lights on.

name: Chargers
signature: Justin Herbert. The team that always finds a way to choke heroically.

name: Rams
signature: Stafford-Kupp. The 'F them picks' Super Bowl team.

name: Dolphins
signature: Tua + Tyreek + Waddle. Vibes-based offense.

name: Vikings
signature: Justin Jefferson. The team that never wins a playoff game.

name: Patriots
signature: Drake Maye era. The dynasty over, the rebuild begun.

name: Saints
signature: The salary cap is a polite suggestion in New Orleans.

name: Giants
signature: The most embarrassing market team. Daniel Jones era is mercifully over.

name: Jets
signature: Cursed. Aaron Rodgers cameo. Garrett Wilson on an island.

name: Eagles
signature: Jalen Hurts. The Saquon trade that broke the league.

name: Steelers
signature: Tomlin's never had a losing season. The most consistent franchise in football.

name: 49ers
signature: Mr. Irrelevant won. Christian McCaffrey runs the system. Always close, never the ring.

name: Seahawks
signature: Geno Smith resurrection. The 12s.

name: Buccaneers
signature: Baker Mayfield revival arc. Mike Evans is the franchise.

name: Titans
signature: Will Levis chaos. Forever rebuilding.

name: Commanders
signature: Jayden Daniels. Snyder is finally gone. The fans are back.
